channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Friday, February 27
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 11:30 PM (1.657 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 07:18 AM (-0.586 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SE 3 mph
